session.user: Run prettier to check the two modified files and report results: prettier --check docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md docs/learned/erk/graphite-divergence-detection.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check the formatting of those two modified files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check formatting of two modified markdown files with prettier

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: Both modified files conform to Prettier code style.
- /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/cli/pr-submit-pipeline.md - formatted correctly - /home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/erk/graphite-divergence-detection.md - formatted correctly
